description: Quick reference for Minitest commands and patterns.

commands.description: Assert that a condition is true
commands.scenario: Assert that a condition is true

commands.description: Run tests with a specific name

commands.command:
object.stub(:method_name, return_value) do
  # test code
end
commands.description: Stub a method to return a specific value
commands.scenario: Stub a method to return a specific value

commands.description: Verify that all expectations were met
commands.scenario: Verify that all expectations were met

commands.description: Define code to run before each test
commands.scenario: Define code to run before each test

commands.description: Define code to run after each test
commands.scenario: Define code to run after each test

commands.command:
class MyTest < Minitest::Test
  def before_setup
    super
    # setup code
  end

  def after_teardown
    # teardown code
    super
  end
end
commands.description: Use before and after hooks for setup and teardown
commands.scenario: Use before and after hooks for setup and teardown
